name: Potential EDR Evasion via Windows Error Reporting Abuse
description: Detects potential abuse of WerFaultSecure.exe for remote thread injection and memory analysis, often linked to defense evasion tactics like potential EDR evasion or process injection attempts.

author: Alyssa Ramos & Mahmoud Soheem
